---
title: function-result-limit
description: "Limit function result count."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Limit function result count. Strider default: maximum 3.

## Bad

```go
func Parse() (Value, Metadata, Warnings, error)
```

## Good

```go
func Parse() (Value, error)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only function-result-limit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
